name: cursor-clone
description: AI-powered code editor similar to Cursor AI

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.clean: cd backend && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../frontend && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && echo 'Setup complete! Run npm run dev to start both servers.'

author: Your Name
